author: WSvX
content:
Session 5 (2026-04-25): Pre-merge cleanup and CI fixes

## Changelog
- Consolidated [Unreleased] entries: removed ~30 duplicates and implementation-detail lines, replaced with 6 concise user-facing entries matching upstream format. Commit 4e1fa5078.

## Rebase onto upstream
- Rebased onto upstream/main to resolve PR #1160 conflicts (upstream added NZ holidays #1158, updated holidays #1159).
- 3 CHANGELOG.md conflict resolutions during rebase — all merged our consolidated entries with upstream's NZ holidays entry.

## Detekt fixes (CI failure)
- MaxLineLength: broke long line in MyWidgetListProvider.kt
- MagicNumber: added '11', '12' to ignoreNumbers in detekt.yml (migration version numbers)
- CyclomaticComplexMethod + NestedBlockDepth: extracted 4 private helpers from getEventsSync (getEventsForCalendars, getDisplayFilteredEvents, getUnfilteredEvents, decorateEvent) to bring complexity from 20 to under threshold 15. Also simplified compound condition in decorateEvent.
- Commit dea77fc0b.

## Current branch state
9 commits ahead of upstream/main, 0 behind. All detekt violations resolved locally (BUILD SUCCESSFUL). PR #1160 force-pushed, awaiting CI re-run.
